5.anchor: you have taken my silver and my gold, and have carried my rich treasures into your temples.

21.note: Or I will acquit their bloodguilt that I have not acquitted

17.note: Or reproach, that the nations should rule over them

11.note: The Hebrew words for dry up be ashamed

15.anchor: and as destruction from the Almighty
15.note: sounds like the Hebrew for Destruction Almighty

17.anchor: The seed shrivels under the clods;
17.note: The meaning of the Hebrew line is uncertain

18.anchor: even the flocks of sheep suffer.
